plugins.name: rules-management
plugins.description: Distributes and auto-syncs Claude Code rules to ~/.claude/rules/

plugins.name: litellm-backend
plugins.description: Configures Claude Code to use LiteLLM proxy with LITELLM_KEY

plugins.name: model-routing
plugins.description: Enforces cost-effective model routing for subagent tasks

plugins.name: notion
plugins.description: Configures Notion MCP server for Claude Code

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Configures Linear MCP server for Claude Code

plugins.name: model-display
plugins.description: Shows current Claude model in session announcement and statusline

plugins.name: programming-skills
plugins.description: Programming language skill guidelines for Go and future languages

plugins.name: usage-tracking
plugins.description: Logs skill invocations (PreToolUse and PostToolUse) with user, pwd, and skill name
